re_engagement_campaigns.reason_for_calling: Re-engage customers who haven't logged in for 3 months.
re_engagement_campaigns.conversation_text: Agent: Hi Suresh, we noticed you haven't used your Acme account recently. User: Yes, we changed our workflow. Agent: We have added a new integration with Google Drive. Would you like a quick demo? User: Oh, Google Drive integration is very useful. Yes, let's schedule a call next Tuesday.

items.name: Interested
items.description: Scheduled a demo to see new features.

custom_question.question: Why did they stop using it?

loyalty_rewards_activation.reason_for_calling: Help customer activate their loyalty points.
loyalty_rewards_activation.conversation_text: Agent: Hi Kavya, you have 5000 loyalty points expiring next week. User: Oh, how do I redeem them? Agent: I can send a link to activate them. User: Yes, please send the link to my email. Agent: Sure, sent.

templates.title: Loyalty Points Activation
templates.subject: Activate your {{company_name:"LoyaltyClub"}} Loyalty Points!

churn_prevention_calls.conversation_text: Agent: Hi Alok, we saw you requested to cancel your subscription. Is there anything we could do? User: The premium plan is too expensive for a single user. Agent: We have a new 'Solo Starter' plan for half the price. User: Really? Can you switch me to that plan? Agent: Yes, I will update your plan now.

custom_question.question: Why did they want to cancel?

customer_satisfaction_check_in.conversation_text: Agent: Hi Sneha, just calling to check if you are enjoying our service. User: Yes, everything is working perfectly. The support team has been very helpful. Agent: Glad to hear! Let us know if you need anything. Have a great day.

subscription_renewal_push.reason_for_calling: Push for subscription renewal before expiry.
subscription_renewal_push.conversation_text: Agent: Hi Jack, your annual subscription is expiring in 3 days. User: Yes, I want to renew, but can I pay monthly this time? Agent: Yes, you can change the billing frequency to monthly on the renewal page. User: Great, I will renew it tonight.

templates.title: Subscription Renewal Link
templates.subject: Action Required: Renew your {{company_name:"Ondial"}} Subscription
